message:
fix(agentmail): detect transient busy in MCP tool-level errors, not just JSON-RPC

The retry logic in callToolWithBusyRetry relies on errors.Is(err,
ErrTransientBusy), but Agent Mail returns "Resource is temporarily
busy" as an MCP tool-level error (isError:true in the envelope), not
as a JSON-RPC protocol error. extractMCPContent was wrapping these as
plain fmt.Errorf("tool error: ...") without the ErrTransientBusy
sentinel, so the retry/reconciliation code in spawn.go never fired.

Now extractMCPContent detects "busy"/"temporarily unavailable" in
tool-level error messages and wraps them with ErrTransientBusy, making
the retry path reachable.

Refs: #97

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
